RT @mumaren_2: 感谢宝玉老师 @dotey  的分享

我给大家分享一下具体步骤，3步搞定:

1. 安装 Codex 和 Chrome 插件：

Codex：直接官网下载安装即可
Chrome插件：点击插件，搜搜Chrome即可，安装后确保插件的状态是Conne…

RT @deepseek_ai: We are making our discount permanent! 🎉

Enjoy building with DeepSeek-V4-Pro and bring your innovative ideas to life! 🚀 ht…

I think people don't realize why Gemini Omni is different than other video AIs. It is fully multimodal, so it can edit video natively, too

I took the famous "train " movie from 1896 & made it a bullet train, LEGO, added a time traveler, a centipede, muppets... (see reflections?) https://t.co/WxSO5h9x1Z

*See cool app idea on timeline. 
*Screenshot, give to my agent running on iMessage. 
*Agent Builds swift app, sends me link, i download

Swift app added to my personal app store. https://t.co/LiCWAzTg4V

In 6 months every single agent will be able to build any mobile app and seamlessly ship it to the app store...

Literally seamlessly. So seamless you'll be able to fully automate the process. You'll be able to have AI research app ideas, build the entire app, generate app store
(No interest in building this, btw this will just be an ability of every agent)

Your AI render could literally end up in Times Square 🤯

Not a gallery.
Not a Discord channel.
The NASDAQ screen.

6 seconds is all you get.

If you’re building with AI + 3D and still need a reason to lock in…

This is it.

RT @godofprompt: Most “multimodal AI” is duct tape.

Image model here.
Text model there.
Reasoning bolted on after.
Adapters everywhere.

You also get a ridiculous poem to laugh at as a bonus 😅…

Selfies with friends work the best 😅 I'd love to see yours
